note: MicroZAMOD UG_2025 active-instrument map to governing Zambia law. Instrument keys are the model's EUROMOD-convention policy names (structure metadata only; no licensed content). Source URLs are hunting grounds, not captured provenance - capture happens in axiom-corpus manifests.

instruments.governing_law: Income Tax Act (Cap 340), Third Schedule Part I (resident individual rates); s.19-22 employment income; annual amendment acts
Income Tax Act (Cap 340) rental income regime (s.5(3), s.22(1)(c) as amended; 2021-2024 amendment acts changed rate and deduction structure)
Income Tax Act (Cap 340), s.4(5) + Second Schedule small-business taxpayer rates as amended
National Social Security Fund Act (Cap 230), ss.11-12 (5% employee / 10% employer standard contributions); NSSF (Amendment) Act 2022
Local Governments Act (Cap 243), Fifth Schedule Part(s) as amended by the Local Governments (Amendment) Act 2008 - graduated LST bands by income class
Value Added Tax Act (Cap 349), s.24 standard rate (18%) + schedules for exempt/zero-rated supplies
Excise Duty Act 2014, Schedule 2 as amended annually (per-litre and ad-valorem rows)
Administrative: Ministry of Gender, Labour and Social Development SAGE/SCG programme (Expanding Social Protection programme documentation)
